profile.name: Gurpreet Singh
profile.headline: Risk & Data Analyst
profile.tagline: I analyse financial and operational data to identify risk, improve performance, and support evidence-based decision-making.
profile.valueProposition: I specialise in financial risk analysis, audit analytics, and performance reporting. My work focuses on transforming complex datasets into clear insights that support governance, compliance, and strategic decisions in regulated environments.

contact.closing: Open to opportunities in Risk, Audit Analytics, and Data Analysis.

about.summary: Commercially focused Business Information and Data Analyst with strong financial acumen and experience delivering high-quality management information, performance reporting and analytical insight within regulated environments. Proven ability to extract, validate and analyse large and complex datasets, produce clear reports for diverse audiences, and maintain robust audit trails.
whatIBring: Translate complex data into clear insights
Build dashboards for financial & operational monitoring
Ensure data quality through validation and audit trails
Collaborate with finance, audit, and operational teams

items.name: SQL & Data Extraction
items.context: Extracting large datasets from complex relational databases for audit and financial reporting.

items.name: Excel (Advanced)
items.context: PivotTables, Power Query, and financial modeling for budget and revenue analysis.

items.name: Power BI Development
items.context: Building interactive dashboards reducing reporting turnaround time and improving visibility.

items.name: Python (Pandas, NumPy)
items.context: Developing automated validation checks and risk scoring models for financial datasets.

items.name: Financial & Risk Analysis
items.context: Identifying cost drivers, financial risks, and performance trends in regulated environments.

items.name: Data Validation & Governance
items.context: Implementing structured validation checks to maintain robust audit trails and data integrity.

items.name: AWS (S3, Athena, Lambda)
items.context: Building scalable cloud data pipelines for automated risk data processing.

items.name: Machine Learning
items.context: Applying supervised and unsupervised learning for risk scoring and predictive analytics.

items.name: Web Development
items.context: Developing data-driven applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript/PHP.

projects.title: Financial Market Sentiment Analysis
projects.problem: Understand how geopolitical news and public sentiment influence stock volatility and investment behaviour.
projects.data: Financial market price data combined with news headlines and sentiment text datasets.
projects.approach: Applied NLP, regression modelling, and time-series forecasting in Python to analyse sentiment impact.
projects.insights: Negative sentiment spikes were strongly linked with short-term volatility and uncertainty.
projects.impact: Demonstrates market risk analytics skills relevant to investment banking and trading environments.

projects.title: Stock Data Analysis & Forecasting
projects.problem: Identify trends and predictive signals within stock datasets for better forecasting decisions.
projects.data: Historical stock prices including open, high, low, close, and trading volume.
projects.approach: Performed exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and machine learning modelling.
projects.insights: Moving averages and volume shifts provided useful signals for short-term trends.
projects.impact: Showcases quantitative modelling relevant to portfolio and financial analysis roles.

projects.title: BBC News Web Scraper Pipeline
projects.problem: Collect structured news article data for analytics and sentiment modelling projects.
projects.data: BBC news headlines, article links, and metadata extracted from public web pages.
projects.approach: Built Python scraping scripts with automated filtering and JSON storage pipelines.
projects.insights: Automation reduced manual sourcing time and improved data freshness.
projects.impact: Demonstrates data engineering and alternative data sourcing capabilities.

projects.title: Healthcare Stroke Prediction Model
projects.problem: Predict stroke likelihood using demographic, lifestyle, and health variables.
projects.data: Healthcare dataset containing age, BMI, glucose level, smoking status, and medical history.
projects.approach: Performed EDA, preprocessing, and classification modelling using Scikit-Learn.
projects.insights: Age, glucose level, and hypertension were strong predictors of stroke risk.
projects.impact: Demonstrates transferable predictive modelling skills for high-stakes decisions.

projects.title: Localized Web Hosting Platform
projects.problem: Create a functional multi-page website with authentication and database connectivity.
projects.data: User registration, login, and contact form data managed through MySQL.
projects.approach: Built a PHP-based website using HTML, CSS, Apache server, and MySQL backend.
projects.insights: Database integration improved user management and dynamic functionality.
projects.impact: Showcases full-stack development and structured data management experience.

Maintained audit trails and produced clear output reports.

Developed analytical projects with extraction, validation and audit trails.

education.summary: 10 GCSEs including English, Mathematics, and Computer Science.

professionalDevelopment.name: Goldman Sachs Risk Job Simulation on Forage
achievements: Completed a job simulation involving risk assessment and management for Goldman Sachs' Risk team.
Conducted individual credit risk analysis using quantified financial data, enhancing skills in personal finance evaluation.
Applied critical thinking and quantitative analysis to real estate scenarios, interpreting data to assess financial implications.
Developed and recommended risk mitigation strategies, demonstrating practical application of financial principles and market understanding.
professionalDevelopment.motivation: I recently participated in Goldman Sachs' job simulation on the Forage platform, and it provided a valuable glimpse into the role of a risk analyst. The project focused on risk assessment in finance, where I honed my Excel skills and developed a deeper understanding of financial analysis in a practical setting. This experience reinforced my interest in tackling complex financial challenges and has motivated me to pursue opportunities on a Risk team at a prestigious firm such as Goldman Sachs.

professionalDevelopment.name: Goldman Sachs Controllers Job Simulation on Forage
achievements: Completed a job simulation involving financial analysis and reporting.
Developed analytical skills through calculating Net Asset Valuation (NAV) and unitizing financial data.
Utilized Excel for detailed financial analysis, data validation, and trend analysis, leading to accurate financial reporting and reconciliation.
professionalDevelopment.motivation: I recently participated in Goldman Sachs' job simulation on the Forage platform, and it was useful to understand what it might be like to be part of the Controllers team as an Analyst at Goldman Sachs. I worked on a hypothetical project to calculate Net Asset Valuation (NAV) and manage financial reporting. I practiced using Excel and built my financial analysis skills in a real-world context. Completing this program confirmed that I really enjoy financial analysis and data validation tasks. I'm excited to apply these skills to a Controllers team at a firm like Goldman Sachs.

professionalDevelopment.name: Goldman Sachs Internal Audit Job Simulation on Forage
achievements: Completed a job simulation for Internal Audit at Goldman Sachs
Conducted comprehensive audits and risk assessments within the Global Banking and Markets division
Developed and recommended control improvements and compliance strategies, demonstrating the practical application of auditing principles
professionalDevelopment.motivation: I recently participated in Goldman Sachs' job simulation on the Forage platform, and it provided a valuable glimpse into the role of an internal audit analyst. The project focused on internal audit processes in finance, where I honed my skills and developed a deeper understanding of risk assessment and compliance in a practical setting. This experience reinforced my interest in tackling complex auditing challenges and has motivated me to pursue opportunities on an Internal Audit team at a prestigious firm like Goldman Sachs.

professionalDevelopment.name: Goldman Sachs Operations Job Simulation on Forage
achievements: Completed a job simulation based on an Operations Analyst role at Goldman Sachs on Forage
Analyzed financial data and identified issues in trade settlements and asset transfers for high net worth clients
Collaborated with cross-functional teams, including Trading, Compliance, and IT, to resolve complex operational issues
Applied best practices in operational risk management and regulatory compliance, demonstrating a strong understanding of the role's requirements.
professionalDevelopment.motivation: I recently participated in Goldman Sachs' job simulation on the Forage platform, and it was incredibly useful to understand what it might be like to be part of an Operations team at Goldman Sachs. I worked on a project to streamline asset transfers and resolve trade settlement issues for high net worth clients. I developed my data analysis, problem-solving, and risk-management skills in a real-world context. Doing this program confirmed that I really enjoy working on operational challenges in financial services, and I'm excited to apply these skills to an Operations team at a company like Goldman Sachs.
